attributes.action: introduce period supplements free of charge for all women
attributes.additional_details: period products are becoming expensive for women to the point some women can’t afford them which is not only embarrassing for them but also unhygienic
attributes.background: use tax to help pay for period products

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958
